name: Ized Chee (oc by Cad)
description:
Ized Chee is a tortie cat of brown, orange and a teensy bit of white, often seen wearing a cropped, faded red hoodie with yellow strings and yellow at the ends of the sleeves. They tend to be quite standoffish and closed off, not quick to trust others, but she can be sweet when you’ve gotten to know her. Having relatively recently suffered a breakup a number of months ago with a sheep by the name of Makkiado, she’s still on the path back to recovery, though she’d never admit how much it affected her.

They’re a big fan of sweet food, but truly any food will do. One look at her chubby build and massive thighs and you’d be able to tell as much. She doesn’t like coffee very much, and would tend towards energy drinks like Red Bull and Monster instead.

She also has two younger siblings: her sister, Peech, who’s quiet and shy, and Lemuhn, a kleptomaniac. She fiercely cares for them both.
creator: GooberGamer
